DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT EDWIN PEREZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- O F F C A L E N D A R -- First Amended Complaint filed on 5/7/04. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-26-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DREXEL BRADSHAW ATTY FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID ZOUZOUNIS ALSO PRESENT.
CATHERINE DANIELSON ATTY FOR DEFT. EDWIN O. PEREZ ALSO PRESENT.

THE PARTIES PLACED A STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS; POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1522 HOWARD #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFT $2000 AND GIVE NEUTRAL LETTER OF REFERENCE TO THE DEFT. ON 5/28/04. DEFT TO SURRENDER PREMISES BY 7/14/04 BY 5PM AND RETURN KEYS TO THE PROPERTY MANAGER. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE PROCESSED PER STATE LAW. DEFT SHALL PAY RENT THRU THE SURRENDER DATE. 3-DAY NOTICE IS NOT DEFECTIVE. DEFT. WAIVES PER 1542 CC ANY UNKNOWN CLAIMANTS AT THE PROPERTY. ANY PROPERTY LEFT AT THE PREMISES IS DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFT TO LEAVE THE PREMISES IN CLEAN CONDITION. IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH THE TERMS, PLTF. WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

JPT-DAVID P. DAWSON; CLERK-PARAM NATT; CSR-JOANN BRYCE. (DEPT 206)
